---
title: Quarto callouts and boxes
format:
  preprint-typst:
    keep-typ: true
  html:
    default
---

This smoke case checks the default callouts with icons: @nte-box-default,
@wrn-warning-default, @imp-important-default, @cau-caution-default, and
@tip-tip-default.

It also checks simple callouts without icons: @nte-box-simple,
@wrn-warning-simple, @imp-important-simple, @cau-caution-simple, and
@tip-tip-simple.

# Default Callouts

::: {#nte-box-default .callout-note}
## Box with default icon
The note callout is rendered and cross-referenced as a box.
:::

::: {#wrn-warning-default .callout-warning}
## Warning with default icon
The warning callout keeps its warning label.
:::

::: {#imp-important-default .callout-important}
## Important with default icon
The important callout keeps its important label.
:::

::: {#cau-caution-default .callout-caution}
## Caution with default icon
The caution callout keeps its caution label.
:::

::: {#tip-tip-default .callout-tip}
## Tip with default icon
The tip callout keeps its tip label.
:::

# Simple Iconless Callouts

::: {#nte-box-simple .callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
## Box without icon
The simple note callout is rendered and cross-referenced as a box.
:::

::: {#wrn-warning-simple .callout-warning appearance="simple" icon=false}
## Warning without icon
The simple warning callout keeps its warning label.
:::

::: {#imp-important-simple .callout-important appearance="simple" icon=false}
## Important without icon
The simple important callout keeps its important label.
:::

::: {#cau-caution-simple .callout-caution appearance="simple" icon=false}
## Caution without icon
The simple caution callout keeps its caution label.
:::

::: {#tip-tip-simple .callout-tip appearance="simple" icon=false}
## Tip without icon
The simple tip callout keeps its tip label.
:::
